message:
Use import.meta.glob for optional generated files

Replace try-catch dynamic imports with Vite's import.meta.glob to
gracefully handle missing generated files. This fixes CI builds that
fail when sidebar-changelog.generated.ts doesn't exist.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
